title: Academic Paper Scraper - Input
description: Search and retrieve academic papers from Semantic Scholar (226M+ papers) and arXiv. Batch search multiple queries in one run. API-based — no browser, no bot detection, no API key required.

mode.sectionDescription: Choose how to find papers: keyword search, direct lookup by ID, or citation graph traversal.
mode.title: 🎯 Mode
mode.description: Operation mode: 'search' for keyword search, 'get_paper' for lookup by ID, 'citations' for citation graph traversal.
enumTitles: 📄 Get Paper — look up a specific paper by DOI / arXiv ID / PMID

query.sectionDescription: For Search mode: keywords or a phrase. For Get Paper / Citations mode: a paper identifier (DOI, arXiv ID, PubMed ID, or Semantic Scholar ID). Use Queries List below to batch search multiple terms in one run.
query.title: 🔍 Search Query or Paper ID
query.description: For 'search': keywords like 'transformer attention mechanism'. For 'get_paper'/'citations': a paper ID — DOI (10.1234/...), arXiv ID (2301.12345), PubMed ID (PMID:12345678), or Semantic Scholar ID.

queriesList.title: 🔍 Queries List (Batch Search)
queriesList.description: Run multiple search queries in a single job — results are merged and deduplicated by paper ID. Overrides the single Query field when provided. Ideal for systematic reviews, topic mapping, and research monitoring. Example: ["CRISPR gene editing", "base editing", "prime editing"]

source.title: 📚 Source
source.description: Data source. 'semantic_scholar' searches 226M+ papers across all fields. 'arxiv' searches 2.4M+ preprints (best for physics, CS, math). 'auto' uses Semantic Scholar for general queries and arXiv for category-specific searches.

citationDirection.title: 🔗 Citation Direction
citationDirection.description: For 'citations' mode only. 'citing' returns papers that cite the target. 'cited_by' returns papers the target references.

yearFrom.sectionDescription: Narrow results by publication year, field of study, or open access availability.
yearFrom.title: 📅 Year From
yearFrom.description: Filter papers published on or after this year (e.g. 2020).

yearTo.title: 📅 Year To
yearTo.description: Filter papers published on or before this year (e.g. 2025).

fieldsOfStudy.title: 🏷️ Fields of Study
fieldsOfStudy.description: Filter by academic field (Semantic Scholar only). Examples: 'Computer Science', 'Medicine', 'Physics', 'Biology', 'Mathematics', 'Chemistry', 'Engineering'.

openAccessOnly.title: 🔓 Open Access Only
openAccessOnly.description: Only return papers with a free full-text PDF available.

arxivCategories.title: 📑 arXiv Categories
arxivCategories.description: Filter by arXiv category (arXiv source only). Examples: 'cs.AI', 'cs.LG', 'physics.hep-th', 'math.AG', 'q-bio.NC'. See arxiv.org/category_taxonomy for the full list.

maxResults.sectionDescription: Control how many results are returned and what fields to include.
maxResults.title: 🔢 Max Results
maxResults.description: Maximum number of papers to return (1–500). Free users are limited to 25 per run. Subscribe for up to 500 results.

includeAbstract.title: 📝 Include Abstracts
includeAbstract.description: Include full paper abstracts in output.

includeTldr.title: 🤖 Include AI Summary (TLDR)
includeTldr.description: Include AI-generated one-sentence summary (Semantic Scholar only, available for ~40% of papers).

includeCitationCounts.title: 📊 Include Citation Counts
includeCitationCounts.description: Include citation count, reference count, and influential citation count for each paper.

sortBy.sectionDescription: Control result ordering and API request rate.
sortBy.title: 🔃 Sort By
sortBy.description: Sort results by relevance or publication date.

requestIntervalSecs.title: ⏱️ Request Interval (seconds)
requestIntervalSecs.description: Minimum seconds between API requests. Semantic Scholar allows 1 req/sec without an API key. arXiv recommends 3s between requests.
